forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures 21 to 26.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Winds southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to southwesterly in the middle of the day then tending southeast to southwesterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.

Sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the morning then becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog on the eastern slopes. Light winds becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures 23 to 28.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Mostly sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southwesterly in the early afternoon then tending south to southeasterly in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

The chance of morning fog. Sunny day. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then tending south to southeasterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming southerly 20 to 30 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early afternoon then tending southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Sunny. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then tending southeast to southwesterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Mostly sunny. The chance of fog in the south early this morning. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southerly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Sunny. The chance of morning fog in the south. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day then tending south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog in the south. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog near the eastern border. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the eastern border in the late morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Sunny. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Sunny. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning then becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Sunny. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog in the southwest. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures 23 to 28.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 28.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures 23 to 28.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the late morning and afternoon. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning and afternoon. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 29.
Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor during the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning then becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures 22 to 27.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 5:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day then tending south to southeasterly in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the morning then becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 29.

The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to northeasterly during the morning then turning south to southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. The chance of morning fog. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning then becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog in the south. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny day. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the morning then becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog near the west coast. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning then becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.

The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 10:00am to 5:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 10 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower north of Marla, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower north of Marla, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds south to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 10 [Very High]
Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 18 and 22 with daytime temperatures reaching 27 to 32.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers about the Gammon Ranges, slight chance elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 18 and 23 with daytime temperatures reaching 27 to 32.
Sunny. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 22 with daytime temperatures reaching 28 to 33.
